DEPT 03. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. CSR: MARILYN NORMAN. C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY. COURT STRIKES JURY AFTER RECEIPT OF NON- CONFORMING PREPARED PROPOSED JURY INSTRUCTIONS BY DEFT; GRANTS PLTFF MOTION FOR SANCTIONS. PLTFF CASE BEGUN; WITNESS TESTIMONY AND EXHIBITS PRESENTED. $180 PER DIEM FEES POSTED BY PLTFF; FEES FOR DFT ARE WAIVED (IFP). COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO 10:00AM, 3-AUG-94 IN DEPT 3.

DEPT 03. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. CSR:MARILYN NORMAN. COURT TRIAL CONTINUED. PLTFF RESTS; DEFENSE CASE PRESENTED AND DFT RESTS. FINAL ARGUMENT BY COUNSEL. COURT ANNOUNCED JUDGMENT: JUDGMENT FOR PLTFF AND AGAINST DEFT FOR POSS OF PREMISES, FORF OF LEASE, AND BACK RENT AND DAMAGES OF $1903.27. PLTFF TO PREPARE JUDGMNT; EXHIBITS RETURNED. PLTFF POSTED $180 PER DIEM FEES FOR 2 HALF DAY SESSIONS; DFT'S PER DIEM FEES WVD (IFP).
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP INC.
